diagrams.title: Availability Levels - Nines Chart
diagrams.description: Shows downtime allowed at different availability percentages
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how each additional nine dramatically reduces allowed downtime

diagrams.title: Response Time Components
diagrams.description: Breakdown of what constitutes total response time
elements: User wait time → Network delay → Server queue time → Processing time → Response transmission → User perception
diagrams.purpose: Understand where delays occur in request lifecycle

diagrams.title: Utilization vs Performance Curve
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between resource utilization and system performance
diagrams.purpose: Find optimal operating point for systems

diagrams.title: Scalability Approaches
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of horizontal vs vertical scaling
elements: Horizontal: Multiple servers (Server1 + Server2 + Server3) sharing load
Vertical: Single server with more CPU/RAM/Storage
diagrams.purpose: Understand different scaling strategies and tradeoffs
